overall.description: Aerial cinematic footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing Night City's skyline during a heavy rainstorm at night. The camera slowly pans across a dystopian urban landscape featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, atmospheric fog, and an urban park in the foreground. A flying vehicle eventually enters the frame, traversing the moody cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of urban park with cyberpunk skyline backdrop

agents.ego_description: slowly panning aerial camera capturing the rain-soaked cityscape and park below

entered.detail: dark green park area with trees and vegetation visible in the foreground
illuminated pathways winding through the park with warm orange lighting
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with various neon signs and illuminated windows
tall buildings with prominent blue and white neon lighting on the right side
large vertical orange-red illuminated advertisement sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized aerial view overlooking an urban park during a heavy rainstorm at night. The foreground shows dark parkland with winding illuminated paths, while the background features the iconic neon-lit skyline of Night City. The camera slowly pans left, revealing more of the dystopian cityscape shrouded in fog and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of urban park with cyberpunk skyline backdrop

events.description: flying vehicle enters from left side of frame and moves horizontally across the cityscape

agents.ego_description: maintaining slow leftward pan while tracking the flying vehicle's movement across the skyline

notable_agents.action: flying car entering from the left and traversing rightward across the skyline at mid-height

entered.detail: dark silhouette of a flying car or aerial vehicle with navigation lights

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow leftward pan, a flying vehicle enters from the left and moves across the frame, adding dynamic motion to the otherwise static cityscape. The vehicle traverses the middle airspace between the camera and the distant skyline, its silhouette visible against the neon-lit buildings. The park foreground shifts to the right of the frame as the camera reveals more of the city's leftward expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across a rain-drenched urban park that gradually reveals the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of a dystopian skyline. It begins with a stabilized view of dark parkland and winding illuminated paths, while the background is dominated by the glowing towers of Night City shrouded in atmospheric haze. As the camera slowly glides to the left, the perspective shifts to uncover more of the city's dense architecture through the heavy rain and fog. The scene then becomes more dynamic as a flying vehicle enters from the left, traversing the middle airspace against the silhouette of the distant skyscrapers. Finally, the park foreground recedes to the right of the frame as the camera completes its sweep across the moody, illuminated cityscape.
